name: seldonframe
description: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses — from your IDE. One command creates a live hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes. No signup, no key for your first workspace. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY later to unlock more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.
author: SeldonFrame

SELDONFRAME_API_KEY.description: Optional. The first workspace is free forever with no key. Set this only to unlock Pro capabilities: second workspace, custom domains, full Brain v2, publishing. Get a key at https://app.seldonframe.com/settings/api.

SELDONFRAME_API_BASE.description: Optional override for the Seldon API base URL. Defaults to https://app.seldonframe.com/api/v1.
